# netbox_region (Resource)

Manages a Region in Netbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the region.

### Optional

- `custom_fields` (Map of String) Custom field values as a map of field name to string value.
- `description` (String) Description for the region.
- `parent_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the parent region (for hierarchical regions).
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the region. If omitted, auto-generated from name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the region.
